title: FDRF - Delightful Creators Recipe Fix
description: Fix recipe incompatibility between Farmer's Delight Refabricated and Delightful Creators.
body:
# Farmer's Delight Refabricated - Delightful Creators Recipe Fix

**Note: This datapack is no longer needed because [Delightful Creators 1.3](https://modrinth.com/mod/delightful-creators-fabric/version/1.3-1.20.x) comes with refabricated support.**

This datapack fixes recipe incompatibility between [Farmer's Delight Refabricated](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated)(FDRF) and [Delightful Creators](https://modrinth.com/mod/delightful-creators-fabric).

Mod Delightful Creators is intended for [Farmer's Delight [Fabric]](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-fabric) by New Horyzon. It exists with FDRF, but some tag based recipes are not available due to some difference between the 2 Fabric ports of FD. 

In this datapack, tags invalid in FDRF are replaced for the sake of compatibility.

Tested with Delightful Creators 1.1.8 & FDRF 2.0.9
